visualization.clarify_default: I need a bit more detail before I can generate a visualization.
visualization.reject_default: This request is outside the visualization flow.
visualization.non_visualization_intent: I can help with visualization requests. Try asking to generate a chart, or ask to update the current chart.

errors.visualization_timeout: Visualization generation timed out. Please try again after a few minutes.
errors.hospital_auth_unavailable: Your analytics session is not available to the action server right now. Please try again after signing in again, or provide a hospital manually.
errors.hospital_timeout: The provider directory request timed out. Please try again.
errors.hospital_service_unavailable: The provider directory service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.hospital_generic: Could not retrieve hospital data right now. Please try again.
errors.metric_definitions_unavailable: Metric definitions are temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
errors.metric_timeout: Metric lookup timed out. Please try again.

hospitals.country_not_matched: I couldn't match country '{country}'. Please try a 2-letter code like ES, MX, DE, or FR.
hospitals.none_available: I couldn't find any hospitals you can compare against.
hospitals.no_matches: I couldn't find any hospitals matching your filters.
hospitals.no_matches_with_hint: I couldn't find any hospitals matching your filters. Try a shorter or less specific name.
hospitals.summary_with_name_filter: I found {matched_count} matching hospitals on this page (search='{search}', offset={offset}, limit={limit}); total providers before name filter: {total_count}.
hospitals.usable_only_note: Showing providers that are usable for KPI queries now ({usable_count} usable, {unauthorized_count} unauthorized, {unknown_count} not yet verified).
hospitals.include_unusable_note: Showing all providers, including those not currently usable ({usable_count} usable, {unauthorized_count} unauthorized, {unknown_count} not yet verified).
hospitals.none_usable_note: I found providers, but none of the checked ones are authorized for KPI queries right now ({unauthorized_count} unauthorized).
hospitals.next_page_hint: Say 'show more' to continue (next offset: {next_offset}, page size: {limit}).

metric.missing_metric: I couldn't find any metric in your request.
metric.metric_not_understood: I couldn't understand the metric you asked about.
metric.metric_unknown_with_suggestions: I don't recognise that metric. Here are a few metrics I can describe: {suggestions}.
metric.description_not_configured: This is a known metric, but its description is not configured yet.

guided.validate_metric_ambiguous: I found multiple possible metrics for that request. Please enter a more specific metric code or name.
guided.validate_metric_invalid: I couldn't match that metric to a valid SSOT metric. Please enter a valid metric like DTN, DIDO, or ADMISSION_NIHSS.
guided.mine_scope_auth_unavailable: I can't resolve 'mine' right now because the action server cannot access your analytics session. Please provide a hospital manually, or ask the backend team to fix the action-server analytics auth bridge.
guided.mine_scope_unknown: I couldn't determine your default hospital scope right now. Please provide a hospital name, country code, or group ID.
guided.mine_scope_not_found: I couldn't determine your default hospital scope from 'mine'. Please provide a hospital name, country code, or group ID.
guided.hospital_name_ambiguous: I found multiple hospitals matching that name. Please be more specific.
guided.hospital_scope_numeric_ambiguous: I see a number but I'm not sure if it's a hospital group ID or a provider ID. Please say something like 'group 1' or 'provider 289' to clarify.
guided.hospital_scope_missing_structured: I couldn't determine the hospital scope from that input. Please provide a structured scope such as provider ID, provider group ID, country code, or say 'mine'.
guided.hospital_scope_region_unsupported: Region-level scope is not supported yet. Please provide provider ID, provider group ID, country code, or say 'mine'.
guided.hospital_scope_invalid: I couldn't determine the hospital scope. Please provide provider ID, provider group ID, country code, or say 'mine'.
guided.prompt_stroke_type: I couldn't match that stroke type. Please enter a valid stroke type or skip.
guided.prompt_sex: I couldn't match that sex value. Please enter a valid value or skip.
guided.prompt_group_by: I couldn't match that grouping. Please enter a valid grouping field or skip.
guided.prompt_chart_type: I couldn't match that chart type. Please enter a valid chart type or skip.

summary.planner_cache_hit: Planner cache: hit (reused a previously generated plan).
summary.planner_cache_miss: Planner cache: miss (generated a fresh plan).
summary.queried_once: I queried the analytics service once.
summary.queried_many: I queried the analytics service {actual} times.
